name: Cape Blossom RGB Preview Images from WA Project (June 2021)
description: A dataset containing metadata and preview links for RGB imagery captured during the WA_CapeBlossom project on June 25, 2021. The data includes project identifiers, event codes, binary file references for PNG previews, file sizes, and precise geospatial coordinates (Latitude 66.891836, Longitude -162.596512) and timestamps for each image acquisition.
